---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem would this feature solve? What are you trying to do today that's awkward?

## Proposed solution
How you'd like it to work — API sketch welcome.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you've thought about.

## Platforms
Which platforms does this matter for? Android / iOS / Desktop / Web

## Additional context
Anything else — links, screenshots, prior art in other libraries.
